title: Full Stack AI Engineer (Agentic AI Orchestration)
description:
About the job

As a Full Stack Engineer specializing in Agentic AI, you will bridge the gap between robust backend systems and cutting-edge AI reasoning. You will design and deploy scalable applications where AI agents interact with APIs, databases, and users in real-time.




Key Responsibilities




Backend Development: Build and maintain scalable APIs and microservices using Node.js, TypeScript, and Python.
AI Orchestration: Design and implement agentic workflows using frameworks like LangChain, CrewAI, or AutoGen.
Frontend Integration: Develop intuitive, high-performance user interfaces using React or Next.js to visualize agentic reasoning and output.
Tooling & Integration: Create "tools" (API connectors, scrapers, database interfaces) that allow AI agents to interact with the physical and digital world.
RAG Implementation: Architect Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines using vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, or Milvus).
Optimization: Fine-tune prompts and orchestration logic to reduce latency, prevent "hallucinations," and optimize token usage.
DevOps/MLOps: Deploy and monitor AI-driven applications, ensuring reliability and observability in production.




Required Skills & Qualifications




Experience: 3+ years of professional experience in full-stack software development.
Languages: Expert proficiency in TypeScript/JavaScript (Node.js) and Python.
AI Knowledge: Proven experience working with LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Open Source) and understanding of Agentic patterns (Reasoning/Planning, Tool-use, Memory).
Frontend: Experience with modern frameworks like React.js and state management.
Databases: Proficiency in SQL (PostgreSQL) and experience with Vector Databases.
Infrastructure: Familiarity with Docker, cloud providers (AWS/GCP/Azure), and CI/CD pipelines.
Problem Solving: A "builder" mindset—someone who can take a vague requirement and architect a multi-step AI solution.




Preferred Qualifications 




Experience with agentic frameworks.
Contributions to open-source AI projects.
Experience with stream processing and WebSockets for real-time AI updates.
Understanding of Evals (evaluating AI performance/accuracy) and fine-tuning datasets.

title: Lead Palantir Data Software Engineer
description:
About the job

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Lead Palantir Data Software Engineer to join our dynamic team and lead transformative data projects within the Insurance domain.

This role is ideal for professionals who excel at addressing complex big data challenges, leveraging cutting-edge technologies like Palantir Foundry, and building scalable analytics solutions to empower critical business decision-making.

 

Responsibilities

Design and manage complex data pipelines and analytics solutions to address business challenges in the Insurance domain
Develop scalable workflows using Python and PySpark to handle large datasets efficiently
Optimize querying and data manipulation through expertise in SQL, with a preference for Spark SQL
Architect advanced data warehousing solutions, focusing on ELT techniques and distributed computing systems
Collaborate with stakeholders to align data solutions with organizational goals and requirements
Apply Agile and Scrum methodologies to drive iterative development processes and deliver results effectively
Integrate and leverage Palantir Foundry to support advanced data transformation and visualization needs
Analyze, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues to ensure data solution reliability and scalability
Mentor team members, fostering a culture of technical growth and innovation
Communicate complex technical concepts clearly and professionally to diverse audiences
Support and enhance cross-functional collaboration in a global, multicultural team environment

 

Requirements

Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science, Data Science, or related field
9-12 years of IT experience, including at least 5 years focused on large-scale distributed computing systems
At least 6 months of hands-on development experience with Palantir Foundry
Proficiency in Python and PySpark for building and optimizing data pipelines
Expertise in SQL, including Spark SQL, for advanced querying and data manipulation
Strong knowledge of data warehousing principles and ELT techniques
Background in Agile and Scrum methodologies to manage and execute projects
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills for complex data challenges
Capability to work autonomously and manage workloads effectively
Proven ability to communicate technical solutions through written and verbal means
Flexibility to collaborate in a global and multicultural environment
English language proficiency at an Upper-Intermediate level (B2) or higher

 

Nice to have

Background in the Insurance domain or experience in Finance functions across industries
Familiarity with front-end technologies like HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Experience with Gradle for build automation
Showcase of leading cross-functional or globally distributed teams
Understanding of machine learning principles for data-driven insights

title: Dell Boomi Integration Engineer | 3–7 Years | Hyderabad | API, Cloud & Enterprise Applications
description:
About the job

Dell Boomi Integration Engineer | API, Cloud & Enterprise Applications




Location

Hyderabad, India




Experience

3–7 Years




Employment Type

Full-Time




Company

ClientCurve Infosystems Pvt Ltd




About The Opportunity:

ClientCurve is looking for a talented and passionate Dell Boomi Integration Engineer to join our growing technology team in Hyderabad.This role is ideal for professionals who enjoy building enterprise integrations, developing APIs, solving complex integration challenges, and working on modern cloud transformation initiatives.You will have the opportunity to work on business-critical integration projects, collaborate with global stakeholders, and contribute to digital transformation programs for customers across the US, Europe, and India.If you are passionate about cloud integration, automation, enterprise applications, and scalable technology solutions, we would love to connect with you.




Key Responsibilities:

Integration Development

• Design, develop, test, deploy, and support integration solutions using Dell Boomi AtomSphere.

• Build scalable, secure, and high-performing integrations across cloud and on-premise applications.

• Develop reusable integration components, templates, and frameworks.

• Work on real-time, batch, and event-driven integration requirements.

API Development & Management

• Design and develop REST, SOAP, and OData-based APIs.

• Implement API management best practices and support API lifecycle management.

• Ensure APIs are secure, scalable, and optimized for performance.

Data Transformation & Connectivity

• Perform complex data transformations using XML, JSON, XSLT, and CSV formats.

• Utilize Boomi connectors to integrate enterprise applications and third-party platforms.

• Work with Atom Queue and messaging-based integration patterns.

Performance & Security

• Implement robust error handling, monitoring, and logging mechanisms.

• Optimize integration processes for performance, scalability, and reliability.

• Ensure compliance with security standards and encryption requirements.

Collaboration & Delivery

• Collaborate with business stakeholders, architects, project managers, and cross-functional teams.

• Participate in technical discussions, design reviews, and solution planning activities.

• Troubleshoot production issues and provide timely resolutions.




Required Technical Skills:

Dell Boomi AtomSphere, Boomi Connectors, Atom Queue, REST APIs, SOAP, OData, API Management, API Gateway, XML, JSON, XSLT, CSV, Groovy, JavaScript, Git, CI/CD, Monitoring, Performance Optimization, PGP Encryption and Secure Integration Design.

Preferred Experience

Experience integrating with Salesforce, SAP, NetSuite, SuccessFactors, Workday, Microsoft Dynamics or ServiceNow.

Experience working on cloud integration and digital transformation projects.

Experience working in Agile development environments.




Preferred Certifications:

Boomi Associate Developer Certification

Boomi Professional Developer Certification

Boomi Architect Certification

Relevant Cloud Integration Certifications




Educational Qualifications:

Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Electronics, Computer Applications, or a related technical discipline preferred.

Master's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field will be an added advantage.

Candidates with strong relevant experience and industry certifications will also be considered.




Why Join ClientCurve:

Work on enterprise-grade digital transformation projects.

Gain exposure to modern cloud integration technologies and enterprise platforms.

Collaborate with global customers across the US, Europe, and India.

High ownership, visibility, and learning opportunities.

Fast-growing and innovation-driven work culture.

Excellent opportunities for career growth and professional development.




About ClientCurve

ClientCurve is a leading Strategic Sales and Marketing Solutions Provider helping B2B software product and services companies accelerate revenue growth while reducing inside sales and lead generation costs.We are a profitable and rapidly growing organization focused on delivering innovative business solutions that improve efficiency and drive measurable outcomes.




Company Details:

ClientCurve Infosystems Pvt Ltd

Jyothi Pinnacle

Kondapur

Hyderabad – 500008

India




Website: www.clientcurve.com




Apply Now

Interested candidates can share their updated resume to: prem@clientcurve.com

title: Frontend Developer
description:
About the job

Company Description

LogAI is a Unified Intelligence Platform designed to empower businesses with intelligent automation across sales, finance, HR, marketing, and operations. By leveraging AI-driven tools, LogAI enables businesses—whether they are startups, small enterprises, or scaling organizations—to enhance efficiency and achieve rapid growth. The platform features CRM and sales automation, billing and finance management, project and task management, and HR operations, providing an all-in-one solution. With its mission to make powerful automation accessible to all, LogAI ensures businesses can lead in an ever-evolving marketplace.




Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site Frontend Developer role located in Kochi. As a Frontend Developer, you will be responsible for developing, testing, and optimizing user interfaces to deliver a seamless and responsive experience. Your tasks will include collaborating with design and back-end teams to ensure alignment, writing efficient and maintainable code, addressing technical issues, and implementing best practices in front-end development.




Qualifications

Strong skills in Front-End Development, React, Tailwind, Typescript and Responsive Web Design.
Knowledge of Back-End Web Development and ability to collaborate effectively with back-end teams.
Proficiency in Web Development and Software Development for scalable and user-friendly applications.
Familiarity with modern frameworks, libraries, and tools for front-end development is a plus.
Experience with testing and debugging front-end performance issues.
Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field is preferred.
